label: Official 1836 (Victoria-leaning curated politics)
description: First official curated-politics scenario for the 1836 start date. Global major-power tags with elevated depth in Europe, North America, and key colonial theaters. Geometry remains the modern Natural Earth scaffold; ownership is a curated overlay (quality tier curated-politics). Not Paradox-grade completeness: residual modern ISO baselines may remain outside priority theaters.

LUX.notes: Grand Duchy in personal union with Netherlands

UNK.notes: Scaffold residual where no rule applies

CAM.notes: Federal Republic of Central America remnant

country_rules.notes: Grand Duchy of Finland under Russia
Default Congress Poland → Russia; region rules partition west/south
Most of modern Ukraine under Russia; Galicia is Austrian via region rules if present
Default modern Germany scaffold → Prussia; region rules assign Bavaria/Saxony/etc.
Default Italy scaffold → Sardinia-Piedmont; region rules split peninsula
Muhammad Ali Egypt; nominal Ottoman suzerainty
USA; region rules strip Mexican Cession / Texas / Oregon / Alaska
Haitian occupation ended 1844; 1836 under Haiti — tag HAI if present else SPA claim
Federal Republic of Central America remnant (scaffold)
Pre-Opium War; British claim not yet formalized as colony
British India default; princely states not fully expanded
Indus basin under Company / Sikh frontier simplifications
Cape Colony sphere; Boer republics not fully expanded
Sparse European claim; scaffold British/Cape sphere
Coastal British footholds; interior uncurated residual risk

region_rules.notes: Württemberg/Baden scaffold → Württemberg (Baden not separate NE unit)
Kingdom of Hanover (modern Lower Saxony scaffold)

notes: M12 official era program. Curated for major powers and priority theaters on modern admin geometry. German Confederation, Italian states, Polish partitions, Texas independence, Mexican North, and Oregon Country are elevated via region rules. Add province_overrides for local exceptions. Run gpm qa scenario --scenario official-1836 (golden auto-discovered).
license_lineage: Natural Earth public domain (geographic scaffold only)
